assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 7 of claude-md-result.md shows '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' which exactly matches the existing entry in claude-md-configured.md.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8 of claude-md-result.md shows '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new row added to the Repository Registry.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 12-16 of claude-md-result.md show all five Jira fields unchanged: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## Preserved (no changes)' section listing trustify-backend row, all Jira fields, and existing Code Intelligence content, and a '## Added' section listing the new trustify-ui row and serena_ui limitation.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md has '### serena_backend (already configured)' with 'Already present in existing Repository Registry' and '### serena_ui (newly discovered)' with 'Not present in existing Repository Registry — User provided: repository trustify-ui'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 18-34 of claude-md-result.md preserve the naming convention text, the serena_backend find_symbol example, and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations' on line 34.
